caption: The video captures a festive scene celebrating the Year of the Tiger in 2022. It is nighttime, and the area is beautifully illuminated with numerous string lights that create a warm and inviting atmosphere. Several life-sized tiger sculptures, lit up from within, are prominently displayed throughout the scene, symbolizing the significance of the year. People, including children and adults, are gathered around the sculptures, taking photos and admiring the display. The children appear particularly excited, with some sitting on the tiger sculptures for memorable pictures. The overall mood is joyful and celebratory, reflecting the cultural importance of the event. The setting seems to be a public park or an outdoor exhibition space, where families have come together to enjoy this special occasion.
